hooks.command: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; root="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)"; cd "$root"; { git diff --name-only --diff-filter=ACMR -z; git diff --cached --name-only --diff-filter=ACMR -z; } | sort -zu | while IFS= read -r -d "" file; do [ -f "$file" ] || continue; case "$file" in *.cjs|*.js|*.json|*.jsonc|*.jsx|*.mjs|*.ts|*.tsx|*.webmanifest) ;; *) continue ;; esac; directory="$(dirname "$file")"; basename="$(basename "$file")"; (cd "$directory" && npx --no-install eslint --cache --cache-location "$root/.cache/eslint.json" --color --exit-on-fatal-error --fix --max-warnings 9999 --report-unused-disable-directives-severity error --report-unused-inline-configs error "$basename"); done'
